name: Create second project via UI
description:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Create new organization via **API**.
- Create new project.

### Verify that:

- User can create second project in organization.
descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials.
  • Create new organization via API.
  • Create new project.

Verify that:

  • User can create second project in organization.
